text: This patient had a one centimeter nodule located in the periphery of the basilar anterior segment of the left lower lobe.
A wet resection was performed with a couple fires of a green load robotic stapler.
The feature was completed with the bipolar dissector.
The pulmonary artery branches corresponding to the basilar anterior segment were identified, dissected free circumferentially, encircled with a vessel loop,
and divided with a wide-load 30mm robotic stapler.
The intersegmental leaf node between S8 and S9 was excised.
The anterior basilar bronchus was dissected free circumferentially using blunt instruments to avoid bronchial or vascular injury.
The basilar anterior vein was identified and protected.
v8 was then encircled with a vessel loop and divided with a green load 30 millimeter robotic stapler
The basilar anterior vein was dissected free circumferentially, encircled with a vessel loop, and divided with a wide-load 30mm robotic stapler.
in the cyanine green was administered intravenously to demarcate the intersegmental plane which was divided with multiple fires of a green load 45 millimeters robotic stapler
Attention is paid to incorporate all divided bronchial and vascular stumps.
All intersegmental lymph nodes must be removed.
